speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe a childhood habit

cueCard.topic: Describe a habit you had as a child.
bullets: when you used to do it
who you used to do it with
and explain why you don't do it anymore

speaking.sampleAnswer: I used to read books with my grandmother every evening. I used to do this when I was young, with my grandmother at home. I don't do it anymore because she moved to another city.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Reporting opinions
questions: What did your teacher say about your work recently?
What did a friend tell you last week?
Has anyone announced any news to you recently?
speaking.sampleAnswer: My teacher said that my work was improving. A friend told me that she liked my idea. Yes, my colleague announced that he would change jobs.
